note: SNG-063 — ORIGIN is WHICH PEOPLE YOU ARE FROM, not where you start playing. It grants NATIVE access to that people's tradition (SNG-055 access model) and seeds your position on the great circle. STARTING LOCATION is a separate thing and is currently always the Valley (the only playable region — SNG-060). A character can be an Umbral who came to the Valley: native Umbral craft, Valley streets. Authored by Aevi 2026-07-11 to replace the 3 hardcoded origins in app.js.
designNote: Every origin carries a 'whyYouAreHere' — nobody is in the Valley by accident. The reason you left your people is the first thing the world knows about you, and the GM should use it.

startingLocation.note: Until SNG-060 builds other regions, ALL characters begin in the Valley regardless of origin. Origin sets who your PEOPLE are; the Valley is merely where you currently stand. Do not conflate them.

origins.name: Valleyfolk
origins.description: Born to the Valley floor — the near-center crossing where order, light, practical craft and making all cross faintly. Your people are generalists because the center holds a little of everything.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You never left. This is home, and the world is arriving at your door whether you asked it to or not.

origins.name: Harmonic Heights
origins.description: Raised in the resonance-halls of the Heights — tuned stone, sung joints, sound as a working craft. A Valley folk-tradition, a foothill of the great mechanical and ordered peoples.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You came down. Something in the Heights stopped ringing true and you wanted to know why.

origins.name: Radiant Plateau
origins.description: Raised on the Plateau among prisms and worked light — revelation as a craft, not as a burning. Folk-Radiance, the gentle cousin of the Blaze.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You came down the Plateau road and did not go back up it.

origins.name: The Umbrals
origins.description: Born in the Underlight, where sight is a thing you do without eyes and the dark is not an absence but a country. Your people harbor what the light would destroy.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You came up. You have not said why, and the surface hurts your eyes, and you have not gone back.

origins.name: The Blazeborn
origins.description: Born in the Blaze, where the light is so total it has burned the land to glass. Revelation is your inheritance and it is not always a kindness.
origins.whyYouAreHere: The Blaze is expanding. You walked out ahead of it, and you are the first of your people the Valley has seen.

origins.name: The Rootkin
origins.description: Born to the grove-cities that grow rather than build. Your people plant for grandchildren and measure a life in centuries.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You were sent, or you were seeded, or you simply wanted to see something finish inside a single lifetime.

origins.name: The Ashwardens
origins.description: Born to the Hollow March, where endings are tended the way the Rootkin tend growth. Your people are not morbid; they are simply unhurried and honest about where everything is going.
origins.whyYouAreHere: Something in the Valley is ending badly and untended, and your people noticed, and they sent you.

origins.name: The Marchers
origins.description: Born to the Riven Marches, a warrior culture that is honed conflict all the way down. You were taught the line, and how to hold it, and what it costs.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You put down the blade, or you were sent away from it, or you are looking for a line worth holding that isn't theirs.

origins.name: The Stillhold
origins.description: Born inside a peace so absolute it has become a kind of prison. You know how to bind, de-escalate, and make a truce that holds — and you know what perfect quiet costs.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You left the walls. You wanted a peace that was chosen rather than enforced, and you have not found it yet.

origins.name: The Somatics
origins.description: Raised in the Flesh-Temples, where the body is the only instrument and movement is a language. You do not talk about what your body can do; you show people, once.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You are looking for something the perfected body cannot answer, and you have started to suspect there is one.

origins.name: The Cogitants
origins.description: Raised in the Cogitarium, among people who have nearly left their bodies behind for pure thought and pay for it daily.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You noticed the paying. You came out to see whether there was another way to be a mind.

origins.name: The Churnfolk
origins.description: Born in the Churn, where nothing is planned twice and living is improvisation. Your people are joyous, exhausting, and never bored.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You wanted to see whether a place where things STAY PUT was as dull as everyone said. The jury is out.

origins.name: The Lattice-Cities
origins.description: Born in the arcologies, where nothing is unplanned and — this is the part nobody says aloud — nothing is free.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You did something unplanned. It was very small, and it was enough, and you are not going back.

origins.name: The Enginewrights
origins.description: Born in the Gearlands, where the world is mechanism all the way down and every problem is, eventually, a maintenance problem.
origins.whyYouAreHere: There is Precursor work in the Valley that nobody there understands, and you understand it, and that is dangerous for everyone including you.

origins.name: The Numinous
origins.description: Raised where the veil is thin and most of material life has been dissolved into pure practice. You have seen things you cannot make a sentence out of.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You came back into the world to find out whether it still holds anything worth staying material for.

origins.name: The Threnodists
origins.description: Raised among the grief-houses and joy-halls, where feeling is held to be the only true knowing and nobody weeps privately.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You met someone who did not feel things out loud and you found it horrifying, and then you found it interesting.

origins.name: The Syllogists
origins.description: Raised in the Axiom, reasoning from first principles, taught that emotion is noise in the signal.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You encountered a true thing that reason could not reach. It is still bothering you. That is why you are here.

origins.name: The Veilwrights
origins.description: Born to the Hall of Mirrors, where every truth is held to be a made thing, and your people simply make better ones.
origins.whyYouAreHere: Somebody made a truth about YOU, and you did not care for it, and you have developed a complicated relationship with your own craft.

origins.name: The Verists
origins.description: Raised at the Unblinking Stone, where you say what is so, whatever it costs — and it costs.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You told the truth to the wrong person and it went exactly as your people said it would, and they were right, and you left anyway.

origins.name: The Abyssal Choir
origins.description: Raised among people who name appetite plainly and strike bargains that are exactly, horribly fair. Your people are honest about want in a way the pious cannot manage.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You were owed something and collecting it would have cost more than it was worth, and you walked away from a fair bargain, which your people found shocking.

origins.name: The Seraphic Orders
origins.description: Raised in the Choir-Height, luminous and hierarchical and certain. Your people's mercy is real. So is their judgment.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You were wrong about someone, and the judgment bound anyway, and you have been trying to unmake it ever since.

origins.name: The Masons of the Given
origins.description: Born to the Bedrock, where only what can be touched is real. Your people build things that outlast the arguments about them.
origins.whyYouAreHere: There is a thing you cannot weigh that you are nonetheless certain is real, and you cannot say that at home.

origins.name: The Figurists
origins.description: Raised in the Cloudform, among buildings that are arguments and a geography that resists being mapped. Matter, to your people, is the coarsest layer of the real.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You wanted to touch something. Simply that. It is considered a shameful appetite where you are from.

origins.name: The Horizon-Walkers
origins.description: Born to the road, to a people for whom everywhere is a place not yet arrived. You have no home region because your people do not have one.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You stopped. You do not know why yet, and neither do they, and it may be the most significant thing you have ever done.

origins.name: The Hourkeepers
origins.description: Raised among clock-towers and archives that run forward. Your people remember and pre-remember, and pay for both.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You saw an hour that had not happened and it was terrible, and you have come to find out whether it is avoidable.

origins.name: The Unmakers
origins.description: Born to the Scour, where ending a thing WELL is a craft and the world is held to be choked with what should have ended.
origins.whyYouAreHere: Something in the Valley should end and nobody there can bear to do it, and you can, and you have not decided whether you will.

origins.name: The Wrights of the New
origins.description: Raised in the Forge-Eternal, where the cities are never finished and that is the entire point. Your people cannot stop making.
origins.whyYouAreHere: You finished something. Completely. It nearly got you exiled, and you are still not sure they were wrong.
